task description:

task description: find the 50 most recently modified files

```bash
echo "Starting to find the 50 most recently modified files..."
find / -type f -printf '%T+ %p\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -n 50
```

```bash
echo "Filtering out /proc entries and searching again..."
find /home -type f -printf '%T+ %p\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -n 50
```
